review_provenance: agent-adjudication (reviewer='claude-opus-adjudication') - NOT human review. Used to validate the pipeline end-to-end. True human sign-off still required before any promotion-safe fact informs real guidance.

hard_success_gates.note: reviewed-pool proxy: 51/68 accepted have >=2 reviewed neighbors @cos>0.30. Unreviewed-pool neighbor expansion is a follow-up (needs full 328-candidate embedding).
4 predicates x 68 accepted (reviewed_label, reviewed_target, nearest_reviewed_neighbor, promotion_safety)

hard_success_gates.gate: vector_rows exist for every accepted reviewed row

soft_success_gates.reason: not measured: no deterministic-only baseline ranking captured this run

soft_success_gates.gate: dedup reduces near-duplicate review rows by >= 25%
no raw model output promoted without review
soft_success_gates.note: every promotion-safe fact has an explicit reviewed row; rejected/revised rows are stored with promotion_safe=false

promotion_safety.caveat: the 68 accepted rows are AGENT-adjudicated, not human-reviewed. They exercise the promotion path but must not inform real guidance without human sign-off.

product_read_path.recommended_next_action: apply reviewed promotion-safe graph facts to self-improve guidance

iteration_decision.next_action: All 9 hard gates pass under agent-adjudication. The pipeline is validated end-to-end: organic candidate mining -> bounded review queue -> reviewed labels -> graph facts + vector rows -> product query separation. Before any production use: (1) replace agent-adjudication with human review, (2) build a queue-JSON -> transcript_label_review import command (this run wrote the table directly), (3) embed the full candidate pool for true unreviewed-neighbor expansion.

miner_fixes_this_iteration: Added task-dispatch / slash-command filter (isTaskDispatchOrCommand) + injected-context guard (isInjectedContextTurn): drops 'You are implementing Task N', '# Simplify', worktree kickoffs whose 'prev' is # AGENTS.md. Lifted seed precision from ~0.46 to 0.85.
Bare-affirmation guard on the intent_kind=preference fallback: 'yes please' / 'ok lets do it' no longer seed candidates.
Fixed projection record-id bug: UPSERT keyed record ids were emitted as single-quoted strands (table:'id'), which SurrealDB v3 rejects; now backtick-quoted.

Fixed vector re-projection id round-trip: vectorProjectionSql read type::string(id) (full thing string) and re-UPSERTed it as a bare key, doubling the id and colliding on the candidate unique index; now record::id(id).
notes: 66 unit/CLI/service/schema tests pass; typecheck clean for label-mining files.
Reviews + vectors were written to SurrealDB directly via a one-off adjudication script (/tmp/lm_validate.py) because no queue-JSON -> review-table import command exists yet.
Embeddings: sentence-transformers all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384-dim), installed via uv sync into packages/ax-classifier-session-sections.
